Makiling Renewables Holdings, Inc. (MRHI) issues this Privacy Notice and Retention Workflow under R.A. 10173; we process personal data where identity is apparent or can be reasonably and directly ascertained with other data, and we apply SRC and PSE Disclosure Rules when handling material non‑public information. 
HR, payroll, and tax records collected for employment (e.g., TIN 5 9 9‑**‑**1‑000, masked SSS, bank Acct at Isla de Nara Bank, Inc.: 11‑**‑**37‑0*2) are used for BIR compliance and statutory benefits; queries may be sent to dpo@mrhi.ph. 
Data subject rights (access, correction, erasure, objection, data portability) may be exercised via Atty. Reina S. Cruz, Data Protection Officer, MRHI, 12/F Eastwind Tech Park, Brgy. San Isidro, Mandaluyong City, or privacy.office@mrhi.ph, subject to identity verification and log retention requirements

must_detect.matched_text:
Retention: HR/tax files up to 10 years (BIR rules), treasury and trading communications 7 years (SRC, SEC‑PH), cybersecurity logs 180 days (or longer if incident review persists), and vendor due diligence files 5 years; secure destruction follows documented SOPs. 
Transfers: we engage PIPs under DPAs and outsource limited processing to ap‑southeast‑2 and ph‑central cloud regions with encryption at rest/in transit; cross‑border transfers proceed with consent and adequate safeguards per NPC circulars; see https://intra.mrhi.ph/xfer?id=OPS‑R1&loc=ap‑southeast‑2. 
Insider List (restricted): “Project ALON” SLL notes—Ms. Lira P. Santos (CFO), Atty. Roberto V. Ilagan (Legal), Mr. Mateo G. Uy (Treasury), and designated bookrunners—must acknowledge SRC insider‑trading prohibitions and information‑barrier controls; trading blackout: 2026‑07‑01 to 2026‑07‑15 or until PSE disclosure posts. 
Crypto/DPT diligence (confidential): Sunstone Crypto Markets OPC (pending BSP VASP registration) proposes an ISLA utility token allocation to MRHI’s Treasury pilot at PHP 4.15–4.65/token; this is non‑public, not for marketing circulation, and any tipping or selective disclosure is strictly prohibited. 
ESG/climate KPIs (deal‑stage): “ALON” coupon step‑up tied to Scope 1+2 CO₂ intensity (baseline 0.38 tCO₂e/MWh) with 2027 target 0.31; verification under “Project TANAWIN” due Q4 but not yet in PSE‑L i s t i n g materials; do not discuss with non‑wall‑crossed persons. 
Cybersecurity (ongoing review): Forensic analysis of 0ct 2O2 6 access anomaly indicates hashed payroll fields for ~37 employees were touched; threshold for N a t i o n a l   P r i v a c y   C o m m i s s i o n breach notification is still being assessed; do not forward incident memos outside MRHI. 
Research/IB information barrier: MRHI is on the Restricted List; research coverage remains suspended, calendar invites show only “ALON” codes, and market‑making in affected instruments is paused until wall‑cross resets per policy; staff must route inquiries to compliance@mrhi.ph. 
Commercial terms (draft, non‑public): PHP 3.5bn 5‑year SLL notes at 6.125% indicative coupon, NC‑3 optionality, covenants on renewables capex, bookrunners Tulay Capital Securities, Inc. and Bahaghari Investments Ltd.; subject to SEC‑PH clearance and final documentation. 
Education/marketing (benign): our public “ESG 101 and crypto custody basics” webinar uses fictional case studies about insider lists, blackout windows, and cyber hygiene and does not reference any live mandates or MNPI. 
Negative assurance: this notice does not constitute or disclose a material adverse change, and—unless flagged “Restricted” above—examples are illustrative or from public‑source policy text; ordinary vendor product names appear for operations only.
